identity.name: Tacos & Things
identity.mission: To serve bold flavors where Mumbai meets Mexico City in Clyde North.

bento_grid.hero_item: md:col-span-2 md:row-span-2 rounded-3xl overflow-hidden relative min-h-[400px]

buttons.primary: bg-[#E07A5F] text-white px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold hover:bg-[#E63946] transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-[#3D405B] text-[#3D405B] px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-bold hover:bg-[#3D405B] hover:text-white transition-all duration-300
buttons.icon: p-3 rounded-full bg-[#F2CC8F]/20 text-[#E07A5F] hover:bg-[#E07A5F] hover:text-white transition-colors

cards.menu_item: bg-white rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-md hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 border border-[#F2CC8F]/30 group
cards.feature: bg-[#F2CC8F]/10 rounded-3xl p-8 border border-[#F2CC8F] relative overflow-hidden

inputs.default: bg-white border-2 border-[#F2CC8F] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#E07A5F] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#E07A5F]/20 transition-all

visual_enhancers.textures: Use a subtle grain overlay on the main background to give it a 'paper' feel.
visual_enhancers.shapes: Use organic, blob-like border-radius for images (e.g., 'rounded-[40px_20px_40px_20px]') to break the grid.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add the Google Fonts import to index.css immediately.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the custom colors (saffron-blaze, maize-gold, etc.) and fonts (Yeseva One, DM Sans).
3. BUILD LAYOUT: Use the 'cream-paper' color as the global background. Do not use pure white for the page background.
4. HERO SECTION: Create a split layout. Left: Big bold typography 'Tacos & Things'. Right: The Hero Image masked with a large organic rounded shape.
5. MENU: Use a Tabbed Interface (Tacos | Curries | Fusion | Sides). Inside each tab, use a grid of cards.
6. ORDERING: Implement a floating 'Cart' button that is always visible on mobile.
7. FOOTER: Make it dark (deep-char) with maize-gold text for contrast.
8. TESTIDS: Ensure every button and input has a data-testid attribute.
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic AI aesthetics. No 'Inter' font for headings.
Ensure text contrast is high (use deep-char for text, not gray-500).
Make the site feel 'warm' and 'spicy' through color usage.
